chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 562 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on MA No.4985/2024 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case. 01.11.2024 Syed Mujahid Ali Shah, Advocate for the Applicant O R D E R Through instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application, the applicant has challenged the order dated 23.09.2024 passed by Additional Sessions Judge-V/ Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Sukkur on the application filed by the applicant under Section 22-A(i) and 22-B CrPC seeking registration of FIR in respect of a cognizable offence alleged to have committed by the proposed accused. Heard learned counsel for the applicant and perused the material available on record. From perusal of the impugned order, it reflects that there appears a dispute between the applicant and proposed accused on fishing as both the parties have fishing licenses issued by the Directorate Fisheries Department, Sukkur Division Sukkur. No illegality or infirmity is found in the impugned order therefore, it does not call for any interference by this Court. Resultantly, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed in limine along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI
